title: rubus × jaquetii
intro: Rubus × jaquetii, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry-blackberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × jaquetii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
